text1: The Persean Banking Confederation is the sector's premier financial institution. Founded in the aftermath of the Collapse by a consortium of merchant houses and former Domain financial administrators. The Confederation maintains strict neutrality in sector politics while providing essential financial services to all factions.
text2: The PBC controls the Aurum system and operates branches throughout the sector. Their powerful defensive fleet ensures the security of their assets and the stability of the sector's financial infrastructure.

text1: A well-defended system serving as the headquarters of the Persean Banking Confederation. The system's planets house vast financial data centers, secure vaults, and the bureaucratic apparatus that keeps the sector's economy functioning.

Bullion is the administrative heart of the Persean Banking Confederation. Its sprawling arcologies house the central banking offices and the residential quarters for thousands of financial professionals. The planet's economy revolves entirely around banking and financial services.

A barren world converted into the sector's most secure repository. Vast underground complexes house physical reserves of rare materials and the encrypted data cores that record every transaction in the Confederation's ledgers. Access is tightly controlled by automated defense systems.

The gas mining operations around Ledger fund much of the Confederation's day-to-day operations. Fuel production and light manufacturing provide steady income streams independent of the banking business.
